text: {{||CIT}} X. Ma, G. Yuan, X. Shen, T. Chen, X. Chen, X. Chen, N. Liu, M. Qin, S. Liu, Z. Wang, and Y. Wang. Sanity checks for lottery tickets: Does your winning ticket really win the jackpot? In Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems, 2021.
